theme.brandTagline: Hire daily-basis labour faster across industries

header.announcement: Daily worker hiring for factories, workshops, contractors and growing businesses

footer.description: A company hiring website for stitching karighar, embroidery worker, electrician, printer labour, machine setup staff, contractor labour and other daily-basis workforce needs.

hero.eyebrow: Hiring for factories, workshops and contractors
hero.title: Hire daily-basis labour faster across stitching, embroidery, machine setup, printer work, electrician jobs and more.
hero.subtitle: A dedicated company hiring website for labour demand. Post your requirement, choose a low-cost plan, and connect with relevant workers in your city.

trustStrip.title: Built for fast, local and category-specific labour hiring

features.title: What companies get
features.subtitle: A practical employer website inspired by modern hiring pages, but adapted to the labour market and daily workforce needs.

cards.title: Category-specific hiring
cards.description: Post labour requirements for stitching karighar, embroidery worker, electrician, printer labour, machine setup, contractor labour and more.

cards.title: Affordable company plans
cards.description: Keep pricing simple for businesses that hire often but still want low upfront cost and clear validity windows.

cards.title: Search live labour
cards.description: Companies can browse active workers on the website, filter them by city and category, and shortlist relevant people quickly.
bullets: Search by city and labour category

steps.title: Submit company details
steps.description: Add your company, contact person, mobile, city and the labour categories you want to hire.

steps.title: Choose your plan
steps.description: Select the right company plan based on category and hiring urgency.

steps.title: Post the first requirement
steps.description: Add workers needed, wage amount, validity days and job description.

steps.title: Get activated from admin
steps.description: Your profile appears in the admin panel for review, follow-up and publishing.

pricing.title: Company pricing
pricing.subtitle: Keep plans clear, short-validity and easy to understand for market hiring.
pricing.footnote: Displayed plans below are connected to live active company plans from the labour database.

items.quote: We needed a hiring flow that works for urgent production labour instead of generic corporate recruitment. This structure is made for that speed.
items.name: Operations Team

items.quote: Short validity, category filters and direct local requirements make daily labour hiring much more realistic for small and medium businesses.
items.name: Factory Hiring Desk

items.question: Can I post requirements for more than one labour category?
items.answer: Yes. A company can select multiple categories and create multiple labour requirements from the same flow.

items.question: Can pricing and plan validity be changed later?
items.answer: Yes. Company plans are controlled from the labour admin panel and can be updated there.

items.question: Will my requirement go live immediately?
items.answer: The current flow creates a pending company with a draft job post so your admin team can review and activate it.

finalCta.title: Start hiring your next labour team
finalCta.subtitle: Post your first requirement and let the admin team review, activate and publish it from ScaleVyapar Labour Exchange.

intake.title: Post company requirement
intake.description: Submit your company and first job requirement in one go. The labour admin team can review, approve and publish it from the admin panel.

pricingPage.title: Choose the right company plan for your hiring volume and urgency.
pricingPage.subtitle: Clear pricing, short validity windows and category-specific options inspired by employer pricing pages, but tailored for labour exchange workflows.
pricingPage.customPlanDescription: Use a personalised plan if you hire across many categories or cities and want additional admin support.

signinPage.title: Sign in to manage your company profile, plans and labour requirements.
signinPage.subtitle: Keep this page simple for employers. Use it as a branded login page with clear actions for existing customers and new enquiries.
signinPage.infoTitle: What you can do after sign in
signinPage.infoDescription: View active plans, manage requirements, follow job status and connect with the admin team.
benefits: Review plan validity and payment status
Track city and category hiring activity
Connect with support for activation and follow-up

contactPage.title: Contact the ScaleVyapar labour hiring team
contactPage.subtitle: Use this page for support, sales follow-up, activation help and pricing discussions.

cards.title: Talk to sales
cards.description: Discuss company pricing, category setup and custom hiring plans.

cards.title: Need support
cards.description: Use the contact team for account activation, plan follow-up and company profile changes.

searchPage.title: Browse visible labour by category, city and availability.
searchPage.subtitle: This page gives companies a quick website-level view of active workers before they post or expand their requirements.
searchPage.helperText: Use the search filters below to find workers who match your hiring needs.
searchPage.emptyTitle: No workers match these filters yet
searchPage.emptyDescription: Try another city or category, or post a requirement so the admin team can help connect you faster.
